**Internal Deal Memo**

Project Codename: Project Falcon

To: Mergers and Acquisitions Team  
From: Dr. Alex Tan  
Date: October 12, 2023

We are pleased to inform you of the impending acquisition of Stellar Innovations Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 198765432K) under Project Falcon. The Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") outlines the transaction terms, including a total purchase price of SGD 150,000,000. For further details, refer to the SPA.

Please note, the current project status indicates no deviations from the initial project plan. However, any changes will be communicated promptly.

For verification, the contact person is Mr. John Lim, reachable at +65 6123 4567 or john.lim@stellar.sg. Internal communications can be directed to Ms. Clara Ong at clara.ong@acquisitions.sg. For secure access, visit https://internal-portal.sg/user/S2345678F.

Kindly ensure all sensitive information, including NRIC S2345678F, remains confidential.
